label: Jukebox
summary: A playlist audio player in window chrome. Never autoplays.
era: The MIDI player tucked in the corner, but this one waits for your click.

classes.name: rs-jukebox
classes.role: applied to the host, alongside rs-window

options.name: tracks
options.note: each { title, src }; attribute JSON or an inline JSON block

options.name: src
options.note: a fallback audio URL: plays when a track has no src, or alone as a one-track player; never fetched as a playlist

a11y: NEVER autoplays, there is no autoplay option (Decency Law). Fully keyboard-operable; the fake EQ is aria-hidden and holds still under reduced motion.
